'''Roonadan''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector's]] [[Bonadan system/Legends|Bonadan system]]. On Roonadan, passengers could board the ''[[Lady of Mindor]]''.

During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] went to Roonadan looking for [[Taun We/Legends|Taun We]]. However he soon realized that she was not on the planet, but instead on [[Vohai]].

It was similar to Bonadan, but its ecosystem was not as ruined as Bonadan's. In some of the cities there were even constructed "rivers" and greeneries to add a level of appeal to the planet's appearance. There also weren't any laws against citizens carrying light fire arms, unlike Bonadan.
